list.name: model
list.label: Model
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT model_name FROM execution_log ORDER BY model_name

list.name: profile
list.label: Profile
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT constraint_profile FROM execution_log ORDER BY constraint_profile

options.content:
EVALUATOR VIEW
Can the deployed AIDRA run produce auditable D3/D4 evidence?
This dashboard is intentionally evidence-first: live operational status, GEOINT output, traceability completeness, hardware-profile budget fit, model registry and known validation gaps. Green means the deployed database contains the evidence; yellow/red means the evaluator should ask for the referenced offline artefact or a new run.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM execution_log
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
  AND status = 'success'
  AND ('$model' = 'all' OR model_name = '$model')
  AND ('$profile' = 'all' OR constraint_profile = '$profile')

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM detections d
JOIN execution_log e ON e.id = d.execution_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(e.created_at)
  AND e.status = 'success'
  AND d.on_land = false
  AND d.cluster_anomaly = false
  AND ('$model' = 'all' OR e.model_name = '$model')
  AND ('$profile' = 'all' OR e.constraint_profile = '$profile')

panels.title: Traceability completeness
panels.description: Share of runs with image_hash, model_hash, output_hash, input_params_hash and commit_sha populated.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(CASE WHEN image_hash IS NOT NULL AND image_hash <> ''
    AND model_hash IS NOT NULL AND model_hash <> ''
    AND output_hash IS NOT NULL AND output_hash <> ''
    AND input_params_hash IS NOT NULL AND input_params_hash <> ''
    AND commit_sha IS NOT NULL AND commit_sha <> ''
THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 0) AS value
FROM execution_log
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)

SELECT COALESCE(AVG(CASE WHEN status = 'success' THEN 0.0 ELSE 1.0 END), 0) AS value
FROM execution_log
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
  AND ('$model' = 'all' OR model_name = '$model')
  AND ('$profile' = 'all' OR constraint_profile = '$profile')

SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM MAX(created_at)) * 1000 AS value
FROM execution_log
WHERE status = 'success'
  AND ('$model' = 'all' OR model_name = '$model')
  AND ('$profile' = 'all' OR constraint_profile = '$profile')

panels.title: D3 traceability chain - most recent successful runs
panels.description: Every row should be enough to reproduce lineage: input image, model, output, settings and git commit.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  created_at AS run_at,
  LEFT(id::text, 8) AS run_id,
  model_name,
  model_version,
  constraint_profile AS profile,
  LEFT(image_hash, 12) AS image_sha,
  LEFT(model_hash, 12) AS model_sha,
  LEFT(output_hash, 12) AS output_sha,
  LEFT(input_params_hash, 12) AS settings_sha,
  LEFT(commit_sha, 10) AS commit,
  num_detections,
  ROUND((inference_ms / 60000.0)::numeric, 1) AS inference_min
FROM execution_log
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
  AND status = 'success'
  AND ('$model' = 'all' OR model_name = '$model')
  AND ('$profile' = 'all' OR constraint_profile = '$profile')
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 10

panels.title: Hardware-profile budget audit
panels.description: This is stricter than run success: observed RAM is compared to the declared profile budget.

targets.rawSql:
WITH budgets(profile, cpu_budget, ram_budget_mb) AS (
  VALUES
    ('ground', 4.0, 24576),
    ('sat-high', 2.0, 4096),
    ('sat-mid', 1.0, 2048),
    ('sat-low', 0.5, 1024),
    ('sat-extreme', 0.25, 512)
), runs AS (
  SELECT constraint_profile AS profile,
         COUNT(*) AS runs,
         AVG(inference_ms) / 60000.0 AS avg_latency_min,
         AVG(peak_ram_mb) AS avg_ram_mb,
         AVG(cpu_usage_pct) AS avg_cpu_pct
  FROM execution_log
  WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
    AND status = 'success'
    AND ('$model' = 'all' OR model_name = '$model')
    AND ('$profile' = 'all' OR constraint_profile = '$profile')
  GROUP BY constraint_profile
)
SELECT b.profile,
       b.ram_budget_mb,
       ROUND(r.avg_ram_mb::numeric, 0) AS observed_ram_mb,
       ROUND((r.avg_ram_mb / NULLIF(b.ram_budget_mb, 0))::numeric, 2) AS ram_budget_ratio,
       b.cpu_budget,
       ROUND((r.avg_cpu_pct / 100.0)::numeric, 2) AS observed_cores,
       ROUND(r.avg_latency_min::numeric, 1) AS latency_min,
       COALESCE(r.runs, 0) AS runs,
       CASE
         WHEN r.runs IS NULL THEN 'NO DATA'
         WHEN r.avg_ram_mb > b.ram_budget_mb THEN 'FAIL_RAM'
         WHEN (r.avg_cpu_pct / 100.0) > (b.cpu_budget * 1.10) THEN 'WARN_CPU'
         ELSE 'PASS'
       END AS budget_verdict
FROM budgets b
LEFT JOIN runs r ON r.profile = b.profile
ORDER BY CASE b.profile WHEN 'ground' THEN 1 WHEN 'sat-high' THEN 2 WHEN 'sat-mid' THEN 3 WHEN 'sat-low' THEN 4 WHEN 'sat-extreme' THEN 5 END

panels.title: Model and compression evidence gaps
panels.description: Execution data is live. Accuracy metrics mAP/Pd/FAR are currently documented in model cards/validation artefacts, not persisted in execution_log.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  model_name,
  model_version,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(compression_technique, ''), 'none') AS compression,
  ROUND(AVG(model_size_mb)::numeric, 1) AS size_mb,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success') AS success_runs,
  ROUND((AVG(inference_ms) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success') / 60000.0)::numeric, 1) AS avg_latency_min,
  ROUND(AVG(avg_confidence) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success')::numeric, 3) AS avg_confidence,
  'NEEDS_DB_METRIC: mAP/Pd/FAR' AS accuracy_evidence
FROM execution_log
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
  AND ('$model' = 'all' OR model_name = '$model')
  AND ('$profile' = 'all' OR constraint_profile = '$profile')
GROUP BY model_name, model_version, compression_technique
ORDER BY model_name, compression

panels.title: GEOINT scene coverage and quality flags
panels.description: Separates actionable sea detections from raw CFAR/Yolo output, land hits and cluster anomalies.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  e.image_title AS scene,
  MIN(e.image_sensing_date) AS sensed_at,
  COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) AS runs,
  COUNT(d.id) AS raw_detections,
  COUNT(d.id) FILTER (WHERE d.on_land = false AND d.cluster_anomaly = false) AS vessels_at_sea,
  COUNT(d.id) FILTER (WHERE d.on_land = true) AS on_land,
  COUNT(d.id) FILTER (WHERE d.cluster_anomaly = true) AS cluster_anomaly,
  ROUND(AVG(d.confidence)::numeric, 3) AS avg_confidence
FROM execution_log e
LEFT JOIN detections d ON d.execution_id = e.id
WHERE $__timeFilter(e.created_at)
  AND e.status = 'success'
  AND ('$model' = 'all' OR e.model_name = '$model')
  AND ('$profile' = 'all' OR e.constraint_profile = '$profile')
GROUP BY e.image_title
ORDER BY sensed_at DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 12
